metadata.description: Repeatable agent coding harness for any repo (.claude + .codex + rules + hooks + beads), plus the bundled codex-adapter.

plugins.name: mvp-plugin
plugins.description: Run /mvp-plugin:adopt to copy the self-contained agent harness into any repo: rules, skills, agents, hooks, CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md, and beads tracking. /mvp-plugin:doctor verifies wiring; /mvp-plugin:update re-syncs the core.

plugins.name: codex-adapter
plugins.description: Call OpenAI Codex (gpt-5.x) from Claude Code via `codex exec`. Roles, free-form delegation, true concurrency, no broker or single-instance lock. Vendored here so installing the harness marketplace gives you Codex too.
